title: Infinity Vaults
description: Set up the Vault so that you can open it again after a while. The first item to drop will be the one that was displayed when you opened it.
body: # Infinity Vaults ### En ### Dependencies [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin/versions) ### This mod is designed for players who want more control over the Vault. The mod allows you to configure the Vault’s cooldown or disable it, just like in vanilla Minecraft. The default setting is 36,000 ticks, which is equivalent to 30 minutes. Many people believe that when you open a Vault, the item that was displayed when you opened it drops out. In vanilla Minecraft, this isn’t the case, but in this mod, you can enable or disable this setting. The default is true; to disable this setting, use false. All settings can be changed in the config/infinityvaultsconfig.properties file. ### Commands The mod also includes commands to clear the Vault. Type: `/infinityvaults clear` - this will clear the Vault you are currently viewing `/infinityvaults clear []` - you can clear the Vault at the specified coordinates `/infinityvaults clear []` - you can clear only the specific player in the Vault you are currently viewing `/infinityvaults clear [] []` - you can clear the Vault at the specified coordinates for a specific player
